release_naming_practice: Name the app release like Solar_Prophecy_V_x.y.z.apk instead of app_release.apk.
web_only_updates_rule: When an update is strictly for the Web UI (web-ui-feature) and does not fix or modify the Android app, there is no need to bump the version number or generate a new APK release. Just commit the changes and push them to git.
